designerInstructions: Preserve M4 25 meter zero doctrine and inject SCZN3 intelligence.
printedTargetText: For zeroing at 25 meters, rotate the rear sight elevation knob to the 300 meter 6/3 setting.
Adjust sights to move shot group center as close as possible to the white dot in the center of the target.
After completing the 25 meter zero, the weapon will be zeroed for 300 meters.
courseOfFire: Use shot group center to adjust sights toward center white dot.
instructionAuthority.intendedUse: Establish a 25 meter zero that simulates a 300 meter M4 zero.
passFailOrScoringRules: Success condition is shot group center as close as possible to the center white dot.
Formal pass/fail threshold is UNKNOWN / REQUIRES OFFICIAL SOURCE.

aimPointRules: Desired POIB is center white dot.

minimumConfidenceRequirements: Target image aligned well enough to locate grid and center aim point.
Enough impacts to establish a shot group center.

unknowns.neededSource: Official M4 zeroing doctrine or target instructions specifying required group size or rounds.
Official zeroing standard for acceptable group location or spread.
Official target dimensions or verified measurement for all rings, grid lines, and sight adjustment zones.

sourceAudit.notes: Local prototype manifest defines paper, grid, coordinate system, and bull center.

sourceAudit.source: M4 25 Meter Zeroing Target authority image
sourceAudit.notes: Printed text provides 25 meter / 300 meter zeroing instructions.
